package.name: rula_calculator
package.description: 3D RULA (Rapid Upper Limb Assessment) ergonomic scoring and UR5e robot control. Computes full RULA scores from 3D skeletal keypoints received from point_2D_extractor, and drives a UR5e collaborative robot via RTDE to optimise workpiece height for the operator. Includes a gradient-descent optimiser with EMA smoothing, sliding-window stability detection, plateau detection, and operator gesture control.
